name: A Different Steak Au Poivre
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Top sirloin steak, cut into 1-inch thick, boneless portions
recipeInstructions:
1. Preparation time: 20 minutes
2. Cut steak into 4 equal portions and press the peppercorns evenly into both sides.
3. Heat 1 1/2 tbsp butter in a large skillet over medium heat until bubbly.
4. Cook steaks for rare (140 degrees) or desired doneness, turning once, for 10 to 12 minutes.
5. Remove steaks to a warm platter.
6. Add the shallots to the skillet and cook for 2 minutes, stirring frequently.
7. Stir in the pepper sauce. Carefully ignite with a match.
8. When flames die out, remove from heat, swirl in remaining butter until melted, and pour the sauce over steaks.
Serving suggestions: Steamed fresh baby carrots and sugar snap peas. (If Densie is coming to dinner, skip the peas!)
